# Vendored dashboard fonts

These WOFF2 files were extracted byte-for-byte from the user-supplied
`BananaGuard Standalone.html`; no application HTML or JavaScript was copied.
They are the same Google Fonts resources previously fetched by the dashboard:

| File | Family | SHA-256 |
|---|---|---|
| `manrope-latin.woff2` | Manrope, Latin variable weight | `a30ddcd349703aff7464c34bef3fffdff405ee50c113440d7c8693c02d210972` |
| `space-grotesk-latin.woff2` | Space Grotesk, Latin variable weight | `0640890476fc1198ab4de571fb658de443c4d85b66466ec09534a8737ab1ce9d` |
| `material-symbols-rounded.woff2` | Material Symbols Rounded | `efc246c05b10dd686c0f8a18036ef74a2a831423b8af62160c89c5f320cea6e2` |

Manrope and Space Grotesk are distributed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1.
Material Symbols is distributed under the Apache License 2.0. Exact embedded
copyright notices, upstream source links, binary versions and hashes, and both
full license texts are preserved in [`LICENSES.txt`](LICENSES.txt). Packaging
checks require that file anywhere these fonts are redistributed.
